	# compress all errors to 1 ("generic or unspecified error", LSB 5.0
	# section 22.2) and hope the admin will scan the log for what

	if [ -n "${SERVICE_MODE}" -a "${ret}" -ne 0 ]; then

ls_scan_targets() {
